title: Snippet
description: A VCL snippet is a small piece of VCL code that can be inserted into a specific VCL subroutine without uploading a full custom VCL file.

name.description: The name of the VCL snippet.

content.description: The VCL code for the snippet.

type.description: The VCL subroutine to insert the snippet into.

dynamic.description: Whether this snippet is dynamic (0 = versioned, 1 = dynamic).

priority.description: The priority of the snippet, determining its order of execution.
